title: MoreMCPlus
description: This modpack adds many biomes with a lot of new structures.If you want an excellent minecraft experiences with new game contents. Download now
body:
# **MoreMinecraftPlus**
## **Features:**
- 100+ biomes added.
- Uncountable structures added.
- Gameplay experiences improvements.
- Maximize minecraft performance many mods.
## **Modpack purposes:**
- Improve Minecraft survival experience by adding numerous content into the Game
## **More Details:**
- This modpack required atleast 4GB of Ram for Minecraft only so your device must have atleast 8GB of Ram in order to run properly.
- Sodium and iris are included in the modpack already.
